apps.title: Final Front: Z
apps.summary:
Oh, no! The apocalypse has arrived! Two meteorites brought the decay virus, and the world has descended into a zombie inferno. Civilization has collapsed, and the land has been contaminated. Only you and the other survivors are still resisting. Now, the ultimate counterattack plan, code name "Titan," has been initiated, and you are the commander of the human counterattack plan. Together with the other heroes, you will go deep into the ruins on the territory, rebuild the doomsday fortress, and reactivate the huge weapons for the decisive battles to reclaim the future for humanity!

Rebuild the Doomsday Fortress
- Collect abandoned materials to repair buildings in the wasteland.
- Build purification facilities, weapon workshops, and defense turrets.
- Increase the base's technological levels.
- Develop the decay virus antibodies, EMP cannons, nana armor, and more equipment for the apocalypse.
- Recruit and train heroes with unique skills to form your own super teams.

War of Survival
- In the depths of the areas ridden with the virus, search for leftover research data and rare stock supplies.
- Take back the R&D base crawling with zombies and recover the design plans for combat weapons.
- Explore the edge of the meteorite crater to uncover the secret origins of the decay virus and the natural disaster.

Join an Alliance, Fight Together
- Meet other powerful commanders to seek energy sources and food together.
- Donate resources to the alliance, unlock the shared technology trees, and defend against zombie attacks!

Epic Zombie Battles
- Real-time PvP battles for strategic fortresses and resource spots to expand your safe zone in the shambles.
- Train your squad of heroes and use the powerful hero skills to conquer the mutant zombies.
- Rally the alliance's forces to challenge the giant mountain-sized "ultimate zombie kings," and terminate their will to destroy!

Commander, act now! Could the key to saving the world lie in your hands?

apps.title: NTE: Neverness to Everness
apps.summary:
NTE is a supernatural open-world RPG developed by Hotta Studio. The story begins in the city of Hethereau, where you play as its first "unlicensed" Anomaly Hunter. You'll join the crew at Eibon, a rundown antique shop that keeps the lights on by taking Anomaly commissions from anyone willing to pay. Alongside a diverse cast of extraordinary companions, you'll unravel urban mysteries, ride out adventures full of laughs and heartbreak, and write your own stories in the neon-lit streets.

◆ Strange City, Strange Adventures

Welcome to the first stop in your appraisal career—Hethereau, a sprawling and vibrant metropolis!

In the crowded halls of the Bureau of Anomaly Control, hopeful Oddities queue up for resident permits, while over at the train station, an Esper commuter snaps his fingers to clean his work suit on the fly. Down one block, a chaotic chase after Danzaburou is spiraling out of control; while across the street, a vacationing silver-gloved Butler is shooting the breeze with the owner of a second-hand electronics shop. Everywhere you look, there's no shortage of intriguingly "abnormal" scenes.

Want to dive deeper into a world where humans and the supernatural coexist? Start your journey in Hethereau to see it for yourself. The lively and quirky daily life here is a grand adventure in itself.

◆ Interesting Stories, Lighthearted Connections

Today's Top Story: Rumors are swirling about a mysterious pawnshop that only appears on the night of the full moon. What would you trade for a wish?

Breaking News: Taygedo's romance crisis! Romance and impulse, heartbreak and missed chances—Miss Tako, the object of a secret crush, is about to leave Hethereau with her guarantor. How will the lovestruck otter get his feelings across before it's too late?

Reliable Insider Tip: Film Orbit Studio is back in business! Members of the Eibon Antique Shop get exclusive discounts!

Weather Update: The Anomaly Rainman is entering an active phase—don't forget your rain gear on the way out!

That wraps up today's 10AM broadcast. Stay tuned for mysterious Anomalies, unbreakable "Oaths," and the ever-growing shadow of the colossal "Circle" organization, looming larger in the fragmented echoes of "Prophecies"...

◆ Encounters and Bonds

Explore hidden shops tucked away in back alleys and meet their enigmatic owners, along with absurdly overpowered bodyguards, "jack-of-all-trades" robotic butlers, troublemakers who can't help finding problems, and TV-headed repairmen with some very curious eating habits.

As part of the Eibon crew, you'll never be short on energetic companions for the road ahead.

Expand your social circle starting from the bustling Hankaku Street! Meet members from different factions and add them as "Bagel" friends!

From the tight-knit neighborhood of street shops to the city's unique hunter organizations, countless side stories await—ready for you to make friends and forge bonds across every corner of Hethereau.

◆ Customize Your Urban Lifestyle

Explore the city on your own terms—stick to familiar routines or shake things up.

Customize your ride and tear through the city streets, or hop on the Ghost Train to cut through Anomaly space and arrive in a flash.

In your downtime, swing by the old shops on Hankaku Street to browse their secret seasonal stock, or buy a cozy little home and deck it out to your liking.

Go at your own pace, follow your instincts, and let Hethereau reward you with colorful days worth remembering.
Follow our official channels for the latest on NTE!
Official Website: https://nte.perfectworld.com
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@NTE_Official

Discord: https://discord.gg/nte

Facebook: https://facebook.com/NTE.Official.Game
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ntegame.official/
Reddit: https://reddit.com/r/NevernessToEverness
Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/nte_global

apps.title: Polygon  Color
apps.summary:
Polygon Color
Sometimes, relaxing can be simple.
It can be as easy as watching a messy picture slowly come together through color, shape, and balance.
In Polygon Color, every tap brings scattered pieces closer to completion.
Colors fall into place, geometric lines connect, and each image gradually becomes clear.
What you get is more than casual coloring — it is the quiet satisfaction of watching polygon art slowly form in front of you.
Polygon Color is one of those casual games that blends polygon color art, relaxing paint by number gameplay, and the rewarding feeling of puzzle-like completion.
Built around low poly design, this experience turns simple coloring games into something more structured, calming, and visually satisfying.
It is not just about filling spaces with color. It is about turning scattered fragments into complete art through a smooth and relaxing process.
As you play, every section you finish makes the picture feel more complete.
That steady movement from chaos to order gives Polygon Color its unique charm.
It is easy to start, soothing to play, and deeply satisfying for anyone who enjoys coloring, paint by number, and artistic casual games.
Beyond the core gameplay, Polygon Color also offers a rich world of themed art.
You can explore animals, fantasy creatures, women, flowers, landscapes, life scenes, and mandala patterns, all presented in a distinctive polygon style.
Bold polygon animals bring striking visual energy.
Fantasy designs add a magical and dreamy atmosphere.
Nature, flowers, and mandala art create a more peaceful and balanced feeling, perfect for players looking for calm coloring and relaxing games.
🎨 Gameplay & Features
🧩 Relaxing paint by number gameplay
Follow the sections and complete each picture with simple taps. This easy paint by number flow makes every image feel rewarding from start to finish.
🔷 Unique polygon art style
Every picture is built from geometric shapes, giving the game a bold polygon look and a more distinctive visual identity than ordinary coloring games.
🌈 Color, art, and structure in one experience
The combination of color, shape, and design makes each piece feel like completed art, not just another casual picture.
🌸 Mandala, animals, fantasy, and more
From polygon animals and fantasy creatures to flowers, nature scenes, and mandala designs, there is always something fresh to discover.
☁️ Casual games for daily relaxation
Easy controls and smooth progression make Polygon Color one of the most enjoyable casual games for quiet breaks, bedtime play, or stress relief during the day.
✍️ No drawing skills needed
You do not need advanced drawing skills to enjoy the game. Just tap, relax, and watch the picture come together one section at a time.
✨ A satisfying coloring journey
If you enjoy coloring, paint by number, mandala art, and relaxing games, Polygon Color offers a soothing experience full of visual progress and completion.
Polygon Color is perfect for players who love coloring games, paint by number art, geometric design, and relaxing casual games.
Whether you play for calm, for focus, or simply for the joy of seeing beautiful polygon art come to life, this is a creative space made for you.
Bring color into place. Complete the art. Enjoy the calm.
Welcome to Polygon Color.

apps.title: Rebel Queen: Dress Up Games
apps.summary:
Every heart holds a magnificent spark, ready to shine. Your creativity, unique style, and confidence deserve a radiant place to glow.

Welcome to Rebel Queen, an inspiring fashion simulation where beauty and imagination come to life. This is more than ordinary dress up games—it is a glorious celebration of self-expression and artistic design. Discover vibrant aesthetics, explore global trends, and create exquisite outfits that reflect your authentic personality.

From E-Girl energy to Red Carpet glamour, every style you design becomes a triumphant moment. Enjoy the freedom to master the art of fashion, makeup, and magical makeover transformations that make every avatar feel truly special.

✂️ DESIGN & CUSTOMIZE YOUR STYLE
Why follow trends when you can curate your own? Explore a massive wardrobe of Y2K fashion, gothic chic, and luxury couture. Cut custom patterns, dye fabrics with vibrant colors, and stitch unique silhouettes to mix and match textures. Customize every detail of your avatar—from stunning hairstyles to professional makeup combinations.

👗 IMMERSIVE CREATIVE DRESS UP GAMES
If you love creative dress up games, Rebel Queen offers endless inspiration. Engage in deep styling mechanics, experiment with fresh outfits, and enjoy relaxing fashion challenges. Each new look you design becomes a vital part of your personal fashion journey.

💄 MASTER THE MAKEUP & MAKEOVER MAGIC
Express your artistry with professional makeup tools and complete beauty makeover features. Blend colorful eyeshadows, contour with highlights, and style iconic hair designs. Every makeover helps transform your model into a confident fashion icon through realistic cosmetic simulation.

📸 CAPTURE & SHARE STUNNING MOMENTS
Pose your model in immersive scenes and capture high-definition photos. Add creative filters, fun stickers, and share your favorite fashion looks with the global community. Celebrate your creativity, gain Aura Points, and inspire others with your beautiful masterpieces.

Create amazing outfits, master stylish makeup, and let your inner brilliance shine brighter than ever.

apps.title: Frontier City
apps.summary:
After a cataclysmic nuclear war, clouds of radiation forever cover the skies of the wastelands.

You are the last light of humankind, and the mayor of a city of survivors. Outside, millions upon millions of zombies mutated by radiation and ever hungry roam in hordes, constantly seeking to devour the life within the city's walls. Inside are the terrified and weary survivors who have placed their last hopes on your leadership. Resources are scarce, dangers close on all sides, and the orders of old has toppled.

You must build high walls, give light to the city, and build a home over the despair, rebooting civilization amidst the ruins.

Will this city become humanity's ark? Or will it become its grave? Only you have the answer.

Wasteland Construction
In a resource scarce and desperate world, plan and build houses and farms, and electric and hydro facilities, maintaining the hope and lives of the survivors.

Desperate Defenses
Build sturdy city walls and defensive systems, deploy elite troops and withstand the endless tide of raging mutants.

Explore the Unknown
Send armies to explore wastelands encircled by danger, seeking precious supplies, deciphering the ruins, and unravelling plot upon plot, of how the world came to its end.

Conflicting Factions
Build Alliances with other player cities, or launch wars to seize rare resources. On these vile wastes, cooperation and betrayal are eternal themes.

apps.title: After Dark - Survival Tomb
apps.summary:
MIND THE MUMMY

Hello there, adventurer! Ready to explore ancient tombs and discover hidden treasures in this idle strategy game? Then grab your pickaxe, torch, and weapon, and start collecting materials, fighting scarabs, and exploring a vast network of dungeons filled with danger and loot. This adventure game blends RPG-style character building with survival elements as you face waves of desert creatures.

LIGHT THE FIRE OF ADVENTURE

Using your trusty pickaxe, smash your way through dungeon tunnels and mine materials — you’ll need them to upgrade your character and gear. Along the way, you’ll encounter all kinds of mummies, scarabs, and other threats that you must defeat to light the cauldrons at each level. Earn gold and unlock random skill upgrades. Choose wisely — your survival depends on how you invest your resources and adapt to the challenges ahead.

Fantastic features:

🔥 Character building – spend gold to upgrade your character and their abilities. Each run offers new upgrade choices, affecting your skills and how far you get.

🔥 Endless enemies – waves of creatures lurk in the dark. Defeat them to earn experience, gold, and skill upgrades. Manage your energy and timing to stay alive.

🔥 Idle mining – collect resources between fights and use them to improve weapons and gear. Upgrade your arsenal and prepare for the unknown lurking in the depths.

DANGEROUS DUNGEONS AWAIT

These dark tunnels weren’t made for the faint of heart. But you’re here to explore, gather loot, and push deeper. After Dark blends strategy and idle collection with tense survival action. Fight off enemies, grow stronger, and uncover what lies at the end of the tomb!

Privacy Policy: https://say.games/privacy-policy
Terms of Use: https://say.games/terms-of-use

apps.title: Dream Raiders 2: Wilds
apps.summary:
Ready to begin a relaxing idle adventure in another world?
Wait—what?! You’ve been reincarnated as an adorable pet?! Become a mysterious (and irresistibly fluffy) hero in a whimsical fantasy realm, and start your cozy adventure across Dreamland. Set up camp, soak up the sunlight, share drinks, and enjoy a sizzling barbecue with friends—what could be better?

【Effortless Idling, Endless Rewards】
Wake up from a sweet dream—huh? Why is the warehouse overflowing?! Stay tucked under the covers and still earn tons of resources! Level up easily and enjoy shared experience growth across your team. Who says you can’t get stronger while lying down?

【A Laid-back Life in Another World】
Gather resources, craft items, and build your very own home in another world. Sip a little wine, unwind after a long day, and enjoy the slow rhythm of fantasy life!

【Diverse Maps, Relaxed Adventures】
Do you love green meadows where the breeze gently brushes your face? Or would you rather wander along golden beaches, feeling the call of the waves? Maybe the unknown calls to you—mysterious caves, molten cores, or floating islands high above the clouds? Leave real-world worries behind and explore the breathtaking landscapes of Dreamland!

【Stress-free Social Fun at the Camp】
As the campfire crackles and the scent of grilled meat fills the air, lay out your picnic blanket and gather your friends! Try out some exotic delicacies from another world—ever wondered what dragon tail might taste like?

【Hands-Free Combat Anytime, Anywhere】
No complicated controls—just jump into battle with a single tap! Your team fights automatically with dazzling effects, letting you enjoy smooth and exciting combat wherever you are. Sit back, relax, and watch the show!

【Adorable Pets, Endless Variety】
Meet the Dreamies—your cute, fluffy, and loyal friends of all shapes and sizes! Perfect for traveling, exploring, and collecting resources, each Dreamie has unique abilities that boost your power and productivity. Who could resist building a whole nest of adorable companions?

apps.title: Driller Ground: Earn Money
apps.summary:
Driller Ground: Earn Money is a tap based earning application where users operate drilling machines to break ground layers, uncover underground treasures, and collect ores and gems for steady income growth. By tapping to control drilling actions, users continuously extract valuable materials and hidden riches while building reward progress through simple interaction. The system combines straightforward tapping mechanics with resource collection flow, allowing users to maintain continuous earning activity. Smooth feedback and clear tracking ensure that every action supports visible income development. No recharge required, Real withdrawal supported, allowing users to turn drilling interaction into a reliable earning experience with steady reward accumulation.

Features

Drilling Tap Gameplay - Tap to operate drilling machines, break ground layers, and uncover hidden treasures while generating consistent earning progress.

Resource Collection System - Extract ores, gems, and underground materials through drilling actions that contribute to steady income and reward accumulation.

Simple Tap Controls - Easy interaction allows smooth drilling operations and continuous participation.

Continuous Earning Flow - Maintain regular drilling activity, discover buried riches, and support long term reward accumulation and income growth.

Clear Visual Feedback - Observe drilling progress, treasure discovery, and resource collection with responsive visual effects.

Income Expansion System - Ongoing drilling participation and resource gathering contribute to steady balance development and reward growth.

Driller Ground: Earn Money provides a simple and engaging drilling experience centered on continuous interaction, treasure discovery, and resource collection. Users tap to operate drills, break through ground layers, uncover underground treasures, and gather ores and gems that contribute to reward progress. Each action supports steady income growth while encouraging regular participation.


DISCLAIMER:
Driller Ground: Earn Money is a free game for ages 18 and up. There are no in-game purchases or top-ups. All rewards are earned through gameplay. This game does not simulate gambling and is not classified as a social casino.
Google is not a sponsor of or affiliated with this game. For support or privacy policy inquiries, please contact:
support@earnplayhk.com

apps.title: Rainbow Six Mobile
apps.summary:
From the acclaimed Tom Clancy’s Rainbow Six franchise, Rainbow Six Mobile is a competitive online tactical action shooter FPS built specifically for online mobile action. Engage in intense 5v5 multiplayer FPS matches inspired by Rainbow Six Siege’s iconic Attack vs. Defense gameplay. Alternate roles every round as you play Attacker or Defender in fast-paced online combat. Experience close-quarter shooter action where teamwork, positioning, and map knowledge make the difference. Choose from a roster of elite Operators from Rainbow Six Siege, each designed for action tactical team play with unique abilities and gadgets. Every map offers new strategic possibilities, demanding coordination, precision, and smart decisions.

Rainbow Six Mobile delivers a true FPS action shooter experience, adapted for mobile platforms.

MOBILE ADAPTATION – Rainbow Six Mobile has been developed and optimized for mobile devices, delivering smooth online gameplay, intuitive controls, and shorter 5v5 FPS matches. Customize your HUD, adjust controls to your playstyle, and jump into tactical combat anywhere, anytime. This mobile shooter supports responsive touch controls and controller compatibility for competitive action on the go.

RAINBOW SIX EXPERIENCE – Experience the authentic Rainbow Six Siege on mobile. Play on legendary maps such as Bank, Clubhouse, Border, Oregon, and Villa. Each map is designed for tactical team coordination and intense 5v5 online combat. Squad up with friends and players worldwide in thrilling multiplayer action FPS battles.

TACTICAL SHOOTER GAME – Rainbow Six Mobile, like Rainbow Six Siege, is an action-tactical shooter focused on realistic combat. Clear angles, gather intel with drones and cameras, and adapt your strategy to every map. Smart decisions, teamwork, and preparation are essential to dominate this online action FPS.

DESTRUCTIBLE ENVIRONMENTS – Use destruction to your advantage in close-quarter combat. Break walls, doors, and hatches to reshape the map and create new tactical opportunities. Every map becomes a dynamic battlefield where strategy and action collide in intense shooter gameplay.

STRATEGIC TEAM-BASED PVP – Strategy and teamwork are the keys to success in Rainbow Six Mobile. Adapt your strategy to each map, role, and situation in competitive 5v5 online combat. Attackers gather intel and breach defenses, while Defenders fortify positions and control the map. True tactical action shooter gameplay rewards communication and planning.

SPECIALIZED OPERATORS – Build your team with highly trained Operators from Rainbow Six Siege. Each Operator brings unique weapons, gadgets, and abilities to the battlefield. Mastering Operators is key to success in this competitive online shooter.

NEW MONTHLY SEASON – Every month, discover new action with fresh Operators, Battle Pass content, limited-time online modes, events, and cosmetics. Keep your team ready for evolving combat challenges across new and familiar maps.

This game requires an online connection (4G, 5G, or Wi-Fi).

apps.title: The Division Resurgence
apps.summary:
Become a Division agent, the last line of defense after society collapses.

Explore a shared open world set in New York City, featuring iconic locations and playable solo or fully in co-op.
Complete more than 100 world activities as you restore order and uncover an exclusive, canon storyline that reveals a plot threatening the entire city — and beyond. Loot, mod, and customize a wide variety of weapons and gear, along with skins and cosmetics, to build your perfect agent and grow stronger.

Customize your agent and choose a specialization that fits your playstyle — from tanky Bulwarks to high-firepower Demolitionists. Each specialization features unique skills and powerful ultimate abilities, letting you adapt your role at any time while unlocking new talents in your skill tree.

Protect civilians from dangerous factions, such as the Cleaners who want to burn everything down, or the Rikers driven by greed, as you fight back against the chaos spreading across the city.

Engage in intense PVE combat, competitive PVP modes, and enter the iconic Dark Zone PvPvE experience, where high-risk encounters lead to high-end rewards — if you can extract them.

The Division Resurgence is designed as a living game, with regular additional content expanding the story, the world, and the challenges ahead.

apps.title: Idle Flight Manager
apps.summary:
One small airplane. One route. $120,000 in the bank... That's how every aviation empire starts.

Idle Flight Manager is a live-world airline management game where you draw routes on a real map, buy real aircraft, and watch your fleet grow from a single regional prop plane into a global operation of Boeing 747s and Airbus A380s. Earn revenue around the clock, even while you're offline.

What you do:
Tap airports to design multi-stop routes. Assign a plane and it begins flying the circuit immediately: carrying passengers, landing, turning around, and flying again. The map fills with glowing route lines as your airline expands. Revenue ticks up with every completed leg.

Key features:
📍 Live world map: real-time plane icons move along your routes on a global map that grows as you unlock regions.
✈️ 50+ real aircraft across 10 tiers. From ATR turboprops and Embraer regional jets to Boeing 777s, Airbus A380s, and exotic premium aircrafts.
🌍 9 unlockable world regions. Expand from US domestic routes to international routes: Canada, Europe, Asia, Africa, and Oceania.
💰 Make money while you sleep: flights complete and income accumulates offline; return to a fully loaded airline fleet!
🎯 Random events: crew strikes, tourism booms, fuel price drops, and government subsidies keep operations unpredictable
🚁 Reward drones: spot drone icons flying across the map and tap to collect bonus cash or miles!
🤖 Auto Flight Manager: assigns planes, creates routes, and re-optimizes your entire network automatically.
🛒 Daily used-plane market, 8 rotating listings at steep discounts or spot-buy a rival's plane directly off the live map.

Progression and Fleet Management:
- Level up by completing route circuits and unlock the next tier of aircraft. Manage plane condition carefully. Let it fall below 50% and revenue drops noticeably. Let it fall below 30% and costs stack heavily.
- Set pricing per route to match your strategy. Economy fills every seat at lower fares. Luxury charges almost double per passenger but risks flying half-empty.
- Build hub airports where multiple routes converge to earn a network revenue bonus. Take bank loans to fund bold expansion. Spend miles to unlock countries, each opening new airports and longer, more profitable routes.

The aircraft catalog:
- Start with regional turboprops on short domestic hops. Work through narrow-bodies like the Boeing 737 MAX and Airbus A320neo. Progress into wide-bodies such as the Boeing 787 Dreamliner and Airbus A330neo.
- Finally unlock the legendary flagships: the 747-8, the A380plus, and rare premium aircraft for the most ambitious operators. Collect exclusive variants like the Stealth 787, the Golden A380, the Concorde Neo, and the Zero-G Orbiter.

Your airline, always working: Over 150 NPC airlines populate the skies with ambient traffic. Speed boosts let you accelerate to 2x or 10x speed. Every 7 in-game days, a weekly report delivers claimable cash, miles, and route credits. Your fleet never stops, with or without you.

Start your first flight. The world map is waiting.

apps.title: Speed Racing League
apps.summary:
Build your racing legacy in Speed Racing League, a fast mobile racing game where every track is a new challenge and every upgrade brings you closer to victory.

Take control of a high-speed race car, compete against rival drivers and push your limits through intense track battles. Each level takes you to a different racing circuit with new opponents, new turns and new chances to prove that you are the fastest driver on the grid.

Winning is not only about speed. Improve your car step by step and create the ultimate racing machine. Upgrade the engine for more power, enhance the tires for better grip and increase your earnings to unlock progress faster. Every decision helps you race harder, overtake rivals and dominate the competition.

Between races, drive into the pit stop and keep the action going. Your activity can make the service faster, helping your car return to the track with better momentum. Stay focused, react quickly and turn every pit stop into an advantage.

Customize your vehicle with tuning parts and performance upgrades. Add spoilers, engines and other racing components to build a car that looks powerful and performs even better. Develop your own racing style, improve your setup and prepare for tougher tracks ahead.

Game features:
• Fast mobile racing with exciting track-based levels
• Compete against rival race cars in every event
• Upgrade engine, tires and earnings to boost performance
• Active pit stop gameplay that affects service speed
• Tuning parts, spoilers, engines and car customization
• Progress through new tracks and tougher opponents
• Easy to play, satisfying to master
• A racing career built around speed, upgrades and smart timing

Speed Racing League is made for players who love car games, racing games, speed challenges, vehicle upgrades, tuning, track racing and competitive driving. Start your engine, enter the race, improve your car and fight for the top position.

Race fast. Tune smart. Win the league.

IGRS rating: 13+

Just follow the numbers and tap to color with ease, and you can gradually complete artworks filled with tribal atmosphere and artistic tension. If you want to experience a free adult coloring app that feels more mysterious, more atmospheric, and easier to get immersed in, Tribal Art Coloring Book will be a choice that is hard to forget at first sight. With its unique tribal themes, rich art style, and satisfying paint by number gameplay, it offers a memorable color journey for players who love creative games.

Are you ready to test your logic? 👉 Tap to Release!

Welcome to Arrow Out: Line Puzzle, the addictive new brain teaser that challenges you to think outside the box! The board is jammed with tangled arrows, and it’s your job to help them escape.

How to Play:

Tap the arrows to move them forward in the direction they point.

Watch out! Arrows will stop if they hit another block.

Plan your moves: Find the right order to clear the screen without collisions.

Clear the level: Remove all arrows to win!

It starts easy, but as you progress, the puzzles become complex knots of logic that will put your IQ to the test. It’s like a traffic jam, but with satisfying, clean lines!

Key Features:

🧠 Brain-Training Gameplay: Hundreds of levels designed to sharpen your spatial reasoning and critical thinking.

👆 Simple Controls: Just tap to play! Easy to learn, but hard to master.

🎨 Clean & Relaxing: Minimalist design with smooth animations for a satisfying, stress-free experience.

🚀 Escalating Difficulty: From simple clear-outs to complex, multi-layered jams.

🚫 No Time Limits: Play at your own pace. Perfect for a quick break or a long commute.

Can you untangle the mess and clear the board? Download Arrow Out: Line Puzzle now and start tapping!

apps.title: Word Association Tiles
apps.summary:
Word Association Tiles is a fast-thinking puzzle game that challenges your brain with clear, confident logic at every step. Each level presents a grid of word and image tiles that demand decisive thinking as you identify strong connections, group them correctly, and clear the board. The rules are simple, the goal is clear, and every correct move delivers an immediate sense of progress and control.

This game is built around precision and certainty. There is no guessing, no ambiguity, and no waiting around. Every puzzle has clean solutions that reward sharp observation and strong pattern recognition. With thousands of carefully structured levels, Word Association Tiles constantly pushes your cognitive skills forward while staying smooth, focused, and deeply satisfying to play.

Features
• 10,000+ structured levels designed for logical clarity and decisive gameplay
• Strong, unmistakable word and image associations that feel intuitive and rewarding
• Clean, bold visuals that keep your attention on the puzzle
• Brain-training gameplay that strengthens reasoning, memory, and focus
• Clear objectives and fast feedback on every move
• Seamless progression that keeps momentum high

How to Play
Look at the tiles and identify groups that share a clear, meaningful connection. Tap to select matching tiles and form a complete set. Correct groups are removed instantly, bringing you closer to finishing the level. Clear all groups to win and move forward. As levels advance, the associations become tighter and more demanding, requiring confident thinking and quick decisions.

Download Word Association Tiles and experience a puzzle game built around clarity, confidence, and smart connections.

🧠 Challenging Arrow Puzzle Games for Adults
Prepare for a real mental test in this brain game. We offer handcrafted special levels and complex knots that require deep critical thinking. It is a cognitive workout designed to boost your IQ.

🎨 Stunning Neon Arrow Art
Enjoy a clean, minimalist aesthetic with glowing neon lines on a dark background. It's easy on the eyes and perfect for night play.

😌 Satisfying Tap Away Mechanics
There is nothing more satisfying than watching the board clear up. Fans of snake puzzles or block escape games will love the unique twist of this arrow game.

🧘 Relaxing Flow & NO TIMER
Stress-free gaming at its best! Perfect for your daily commute, a coffee break, or winding down before bed. This arrow puzzle is your go-to companion for moments of focus and calm.

🔍 Zoom & Grid Assistance
Don't let complex shapes stop you! Use our Grid Assistance and Zoom tools to see every detail and solve even the hardest and trickiest brain puzzles.

🚀 1000+ Creative Arrow Levels
You never know what comes next! From abstract art to complex labyrinths, enjoy the surprise of unlocking unique shapes in your tap away journey.

❓ FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS (FAQ)

Q: What kind of game is Arrow Madness?
A: It is a beautiful arrows puzzle escape game. You tap away arrows to untangle complex, snake-like knots, combining spatial logic with satisfying mechanics.

Q: Is there a time limit to solve the puzzles?
A: No! Arrow Madness is a completely stress-free brain game with NO timers. You can relax, take your time, and enjoy the logic quest at your own pace.

A: Absolutely. It is specifically designed as a challenging cognitive workout for adults. The deep spatial thinking required makes it the perfect brain teaser.

apps.title: Calm Solitaire: Classic Card
apps.summary:
Step into a world of tranquil card play with Calm Solitaire. This is the classic Solitaire you know, reimagined as a peaceful retreat for your mind. Designed with soothing visuals, relaxing interactions, and a stress-free environment, it’s the perfect way to unwind, focus, and enjoy a moment for yourself. Fully playable offline and tailored for every screen.

A Truly Peaceful Experience
• Easy on the Eyes: Enjoy carefully designed, large cards, clear fonts, and soft, calming color themes that make every game session a visual comfort.
• Faithful and Pure: We’ve kept the classic Klondike rules intact, free from distracting ads or cluttered layouts. It’s just you and the cards.
• Mindful Mental Exercise: Perfect for daily brain training. Quietly enhance your memory, strategic thinking, and patience as you play and decompress.
• Effortless Interaction: A clean, intuitive interface makes moving cards with a tap or drag beautifully smooth and completely natural.

Simple Rules, Deep Satisfaction
• Build your foundation stacks in descending order from King to Ace, alternating between red and black suits.
• Choose your pace with Peaceful Mode (Draw 1) or Thoughtful Mode (Draw 3).
• Take your time. Use unlimited undo & hints to work through each layout at your own rhythm.

Features Designed for Serenity
• Daily Moments of Peace: Unwind with a new, unique challenge every day. Track your progress and collect serene-themed badges.
• Personalize Your Peace: Create your ideal calming atmosphere with a selection of elegant card styles and tranquil background themes.
• Your Offline Sanctuary: No internet? No problem. Your calm escape is always with you—on a plane, during a commute, or in your favorite chair.
• Comfortably Inclusive: Thoughtfully designed with left-hand mode, high-contrast options, and clear, readable text for all players.
• Seamless on Any Device: Experience perfect gameplay on smartphones, tablets, and foldables of any size.
• Evolving Tranquility: Look forward to regular updates that bring fresh, calming themes and new ways to play to your collection.

Find Your Focus with Every Deal
Whether you're seeking a nostalgic pastime or a new ritual for mental wellness, Calm Solitaire turns a spare minute into a rewarding opportunity for focus and calm.

Download our Calm Solitaire Now and Embrace the Peace!

apps.title: Pixel Blast: Robot Shooter
apps.summary:
THE FACTORY IS RUNNING. YOUR ROBOTS ARE READY.

Welcome to Pixel Blast — a color puzzle shooter built around one brutal, satisfying loop: deploy factory robots, blast matching pixel cubes off the assembly grid, and clear the board before the line jams.

Your bots don't mess around. They're loaded, color-coded, and ready to fire.

── HOW IT WORKS ──

Your robot shooters wait in the factory bay — each one armed with its own color charge. Launch a bot onto the conveyor and it automatically blasts every matching pixel cube in its path. The board is a grid of colored blocks. Your robots are the solution.

Manage the queue. Time your deployments. Chain your shots to demolish entire color zones at once.

One wrong sequence jams the machine. Five robots in the bay. One conveyor. Thousands of combinations.

Simple to pick up. Hard to put down.

── FEATURES ──

🤖 Factory robot shooters — Each bot is color-coded, locked, and ready to fire

⚙️ Conveyor line system — Queue your robots, control the order, clear the grid

🎯 Precision color blasting — Robots only fire at their matching color — every shot is intentional

⚡ One-tap controls — Deploy, aim, and blast with a single tap

🏭 Thousands of levels — Every stage is a new factory puzzle to dismantle block by block

💥 Chain reactions — Clear one color zone and watch the cascade wipe the board clean

🔩 No timers, no rush — Strategy and precision beat speed every time

── THE CHALLENGE ──

Early shifts are straightforward — the grid is manageable, the colors are few. Push further and the assembly boards grow wider, the color combos get denser, and the conveyor margin for error shrinks to nothing.

Every level is an engineering problem. Analyze the board. Sequence your bots correctly. Execute the perfect run.

Master the factory. Master the blast.

── MADE FOR ──

✔ Quick sessions — one grid, one clear, one win

✔ Fans of color-match and cube puzzle games

✔ Players who love watching a chaotic board go completely clean

✔ Anyone who wants satisfying one-tap action without the noise

Pixel Blast is free to download and play. No Wi-Fi required. Short sessions, maximum payoff.

🏭 Report for duty. Blast away. Leave no cube standing.

apps.title: Hatch Dragons
apps.summary:
Discover Dragons like you’ve never seen before! Collect and care for hundreds of unique Dragons, uncovering their origins as they grow. From playful Cat Dragons to rare Bluebell Dragons, every new Dragon you hatch and raise brings this cozy, peaceful world to life.

Long ago, Dragons filled this enchanted forest, thriving alongside nature. Each evolved into forms as diverse as the surrounding flora and fauna. Some shimmered with glittering scales, others were soft and furry, and some even bloomed with flowers or mushrooms.

When nearby mining drove the Dragons away, fog crept in and the forest fell silent for years. Now, join Liv the Elf to lift the fog, summon the Dragons home, and help the forest sparkle with life once more.

GAME HIGHLIGHTS
✨ Summon Dragons: Help Liv mix elements, gems, and more to call Dragons of all shapes, forms, and rarities to your forest.
💖 Raise Dragons: Hatch eggs, feed your Dragons, and help them grow into magical, bonded companions.
📖 Collect Hundreds of Dragons: Discover a magical array of Dragons that evolved alongside nature.
🔮 Uncover Lore: Reveal charming legends and little-known facts about your Dragons.
🌲 Explore and Restore: Clear the fog and help the forest awaken with life, magic, and folkloric friends.
🍄 Decorate Your Forest: Adorn your forest with plants and decor that possess magical abilities to help you progress.
🎁 Missions and Events: Missions, updates, and limited-time events bring exciting new Dragons, décor, and rewards. There’s always something new to discover!

If you love Dragons, cozy collection games, and relaxing adventures, you will be enchanted by Hatch Dragons.

Hatch Dragons is developed and published by Runaway.

apps.title: Arrow Maze-Tap Away
apps.summary:
Welcome to Arrow Maze-Tap Away : Logic's Solution Domain, a minimalist puzzle game that tests your planning and foresight. Your goal is simple and clear: safely extract all the arrows. However, every move must be precise, or the entire board will be thrown into chaos.
Core Features:
Step-by-Step Logical Challenges: Every move is crucial. You'll need to anticipate the paths of all the arrows, carefully plan their extraction order, and find the one and only path to order amidst the chaos.

Massive Handcrafted Puzzles: The game features thousands of levels meticulously polished by designers. With a smooth, progressive difficulty curve—from introductory guides to mind-bending challenges—it will challenge your intellectual limits step by step.

Minimalist Vision, Ultimate Focus: Free from all distractions, the clean and restrained visual style allows you to immerse yourself completely in the world of thought, focusing on the structure and logic of the puzzle itself.
A Stress-Free Space for Contemplation: No time limits, no score penalties. You can pause at any time to rehearse different strategies and enjoy the pure joy of solving complex problems at a relaxed pace.
Thoughtful Hint System: When your thoughts hit a dead end, the built-in hint system will light a lamp for you, providing just the right amount of guidance to help you break through bottlenecks.
Are you ready? Within the confines of the grid, use your wisdom to carve a path of escape for all the arrows—free from conflict.

apps.title: CrossGrams - PvP Puzzle Game
apps.summary:
CrossGrams is a fresh, competitive take on crossword puzzles where two players solve the board together — one move at a time. Smart strategy, quick thinking, and a strong vocabulary are your keys to victory!

CrossGrams is a turn-based multiplayer crossword game inspired by Scandinavian-style puzzles, with clues inside the grid and occasional picture clues for extra fun and variety.

How it works:
- Each turn, you receive 5 random letters
- Score points by placing correct letters, completing words, and using bonus tiles
- Strategic choices matter — sometimes saving a powerful letter for later can win the match!

Game Features:
- Unique Cooperative Crossword Gameplay – Complete the puzzle together while competing for the highest score
- Leagues – Win matches, earn cups, and climb through competitive leagues to prove your crossword mastery
- Duel Journey – Face increasingly challenging opponents, defeat powerful bosses, and claim a big prize at the end
- Achievements – Complete challenges, show off your progress, and unlock bragging rights
- Bonus Tiles & Scoring Combos – Big plays mean big rewards

CrossGrams blends the best of crossword puzzles, word strategy games, and competitive multiplayer into one addictive experience. Fans of crossword games, Scrabble-style word play, and turn-based strategy will feel right at home — and quickly get hooked.

Play smart. Play fast. Play CrossGrams.

apps.title: Word Associations Now!
apps.summary:
Word Associations Now! perfectly blends word association gameplay with modern vocabulary sorting logic. Designed for strategic thinkers, it offers a clean, elegant, and stress-free linguistic journey.

Organize word cards and match them into the correct categories. There are no time limits and no move counts—plan at your own pace, discover logical connections, and clear the board in a relaxing atmosphere.

Features:
• Innovative Auto-Merge: Smartly recognizes your progress and merges cards automatically, making the sorting process clearer and more satisfying.
• Stress-Free Gameplay: No timers, no move limits. Whether you want to unwind or challenge your mind, enjoy a pure puzzle experience.
• Visual Customization: Multiple color schemes, dark/light modes, and beautiful wallpapers. Supports 3 font sizes for the most comfortable reading experience.
• Satisfying Progression: Earn badges, complete daily tasks, and compete on global leaderboards.
• Daily Challenges: Features 3 difficulty levels and monthly collectible trophies to track your achievements.
• Multilingual Support: Localized in 10+ languages. Long-press any card to trigger the system dictionary for instant definitions.

Download Word Associations Now! today and discover the joy of sorting words with strategy and style.

apps.title: Mini Pirate Clash
apps.summary:
Mini Pirate Clash: Game Highlights
Mini Pirate Clash is an addictive and incredibly creative light-competitive RPG mobile game. Featuring innovative gameplay, thrilling combat, and a wealth of features, it delivers a fresh and unique adventure on the high seas!

🌟 Highlight 1: Innovative Gameplay – Say Goodbye to the Same Old Routine! Break away from the stale patterns of traditional RPGs. This game blends light strategy, real-time combat, and fun exploration to ensure every round is a brand-new experience. With randomized island maps, unique pirate skills, and a creative progression system, it is easy to pick up but offers deep strategic depth. Whether you are a casual player or a competitive pro, you'll find your own brand of fun here.

💥 Highlight 2: High-Octane Combat – Feel the Adrenaline Rush! Experience a dual-mode combat system featuring real-time island duels and close-quarters pirate brawls. Roaring cannons, ship-to-ship collisions, and seamless skill combos create a fast-paced, high-impact combat experience where victory is decided in an instant. Whether it's a 1v1 duel or a chaotic multiplayer melee, the heart-pounding action never stops. Claim massive reward chests to clear the fog of war and discover mysterious new continents!

🎯 Highlight 3: Feature-Rich Content – Endless Replayability! The game is packed with diverse systems including character development, ship customization, island exploration, quest challenges, and social interactions. With a massive collection of skins, items, and achievements waiting to be unlocked—and constant gameplay updates—there is always something new. Whether you love leveling up, collecting rare items, or climbing the leaderboards, this sea has it all.

Download this incredible adventure today and set sail!

apps.title: Last Asylum: Plague
apps.summary:
One sanctuary. One doctor. One last chance.
A mysterious plague has swept across the world, leaving chaos in its wake. As a plague doctor, you become the town's final beacon of hope. Build and manage a sanctuary, heal those you can, and guide your people through the darkest days of the pandemic. Your strategy will shape their future.

[The Sanctuary of Hope]
Run your sanctuary as the last refuge against the plague.
Treat patients, craft herbal remedies, and expand your wards to shelter the growing tide of the sick and desperate.

[Counter the Rat Swarm]
Hold the last line against the Rat Swarm.
Recruit and upgrade your heroes. Build as many defensive towers as you can. Slay the Rat King to repel the swarm.

[Gather Resources, Rebuild the Town]
Dispatch survivors to gather resources and secure outposts in the wild.
Collect timber, herbs, food, and other essential supplies. Construct production facilities, expand warehouses, and upgrade residential buildings to house more survivors.

[Seize Abandoned Ruins]
Form elite squads of heroes to reclaim plague-ridden towns.
Create the best lineup of different types of heroes. Outsmart contenders on the battlefield. Gain control of crucial cities. Expand your territory in this world.

apps.title: Jewel Coloring
apps.summary:
Jewel Coloring: Sparkle & Create with Pixel Art Puzzles
Enter a vibrant world of glowing jewels where creativity and puzzle-solving come together in perfect harmony! Designed for easy, relaxing fun, this one-of-a-kind experience combines color sorting, pixel art creation, and satisfying casual gameplay all in one. With smooth, user-friendly controls and levels that gently grow more engaging, it’s the perfect way to unwind while keeping your mind active.
How to Play: Color, Sort, & Craft Beautiful Pixel Art
- Sort Jewels by Color with Ease: Just tap and arrange sparkling jewels into their matching color groups. No confusing rules or complicated steps—just simple, enjoyable sorting action.
- Plan & Organize Your Workspace: Keep your jewel shelf neatly arranged and think ahead to clear each puzzle efficiently. Every small choice helps you complete the picture smoothly.
- Uncover Stunning Pixel Art Masterpieces: As you sort and place each jewel, watch as hidden pixel art designs slowly come to life. Every level reveals a brand-new, dazzling image to enjoy.
- Enjoy Endless Creative Satisfaction: There’s no pressure—just calm, rewarding gameplay that turns every moment into a peaceful artistic break.
What Makes Jewel Coloring Special
- Hundreds of Unique Levels & Themes: Enjoy a huge variety of pixel art puzzles, with fresh themes and exclusive limited-time collections added regularly.
- Polished Visuals & Immersive Feedback: Bright, detailed 3D jewels, crisp visual effects, and satisfying audio feedback make every tap feel smooth and rewarding.
- Play Anywhere, No Wi-Fi Needed: Play offline whenever you have free time. Pause, resume, and play at your own speed, no internet connection required.
- Easy for Everyone, Fun for All Ages: Simple mechanics make it accessible for casual players, while thoughtful level design keeps it interesting for puzzle and art fans alike.
Why You’ll Love Jewel Coloring
- Gentle Brain Exercise: Sorting, planning, and matching help support focus, logic, and spatial thinking—all while having fun.
- Natural Stress Relief: Lose yourself in calming, rhythmic jewel sorting that helps you relax and unwind after a busy day.
- For All Skill Levels: Whether you’re looking for a quick distraction or a creative hobby, it’s made for kids, adults, and everyone in between.
Download Jewel Coloring today and step into a bright, peaceful world of color, jewels, and pixel art. Create, sort, and relax—your next artistic adventure is just a tap away!

apps.title: Rap Star:Idle Clicker
apps.summary:
From streets to stardom — tap, rap, earn, date, collect. Rap Star: Idle Clicker is a rap life simulator meets idle tycoon. Start with $1 and build your rap empire. Every tap rewrites your destiny.
TAP TO RAP, STACK CASH
Every tap is money. From freestyling on corners to sold-out stadiums, your rap career starts from zero. Invest in studios, unlock new flows, hire producers. Even offline, your hustle never stops.
FROM BROKE TO BILLIONAIRE
A busted car with no AC and one dollar. That's all you start with. But the finish line is a penthouse, a private jet, and an island with your name on it. Upgrade your crib, car, clothes, studio — watch your world transform from ruins to empire. Not a fairy tale. A real, brick-by-brick come-up.
BUILD YOUR MUSIC EMPIRE
More than making songs — build an empire. Own a record label, launch fashion lines, sign rising stars. Drop singles that break the internet, top the charts, become a cultural icon. Every choice shapes your legend.
MINI-GAMES THAT KEEP YOU HOOKED
Your rap career isn't just tapping — addictive mini-games pop up throughout your rise. The faster your fingers, the faster your fame.
ROMANCE — STARS ARE NEVER ALONE
When you reach the top, the women follow. They're not accessories — each one has her own story, her own temper, her own world.
Take her somewhere romantic and watch her melt. Take her somewhere ridiculous and watch her flip. Give her a cheap little gift to make her smile, or drop serious cash on luxury and watch her scream. Get to know her past and enter her heart, or keep your distance and enjoy the tension.
Every woman treats you differently. Every relationship goes where you take it. Loyal or player? Deep love or just a fling? This is your life. Nobody chooses for you.
COLLECT — DEFINE YOUR IDENTITY THROUGH TASTE
Every rap legend has a collection. Kicks, vinyl, skateboards, diamond grillz — these aren't just items. They're symbols of rap culture. Symbols of who you are.
Open the vault. Pull legendary pieces. Every item makes you stronger, and completing certain combos unlocks hidden stories — about the deepest secrets in the industry.
Your collection isn't just trophies in a display case. It's proof of the roads you've walked, the money you've earned, the life you've lived.
IMMERSIVE STORY
Comic-style dialogue with branching choices that affect the outcome. Every decision changes your path, your reputation, and your ending.
PK BATTLES
PK battles in your hood. Upgrade faster to win. Defend your block. Earn respect.
FEATURES
• Idle clicker core — Tap to earn. Offline earnings never stop.
• Life simulation — Relationships, reputation, fame. Experience the ups and downs.
• Full come-up — From $1 to billionaire. Upgrade everything.
• Multiple unique girlfriends — Every relationship has depth. Every woman has attitude.
• Legendary collectibles — Totems of rap culture. Proof of your taste and identity.
• Music tycoon — Studios, labels, business empire.
• Addictive mini-games — Tap challenges for bonus rewards.
• Go viral — Top charts. Become an icon.
• Immersive story — Branching choices change your fate.
• PK battles — Compete with rivals. Win respect.
• Hip hop culture — From underground to stadiums.
• Endless upgrades — Cribs, cars, clothes, studios. Everything levels up.
YOUR LEGEND STARTS NOW
No handouts. No shortcuts. Just a mic and a dream. Pick it up. The world is waiting.

apps.title: Jigsolitaire Master Puzzle
apps.summary:
Step into a world of nostalgic charm with Jigsolitaire Master, where classic jigsaw puzzles meet the calming logic of solitaire card games! ✨ Immerse yourself in beautifully crafted retro-themed HD photos – from vintage farm scenes and classic cars to old-world landscapes. Slide, match, and snap your way to completing stunning pictures, and experience the deeply satisfying “click” when every piece finds its perfect place.

🎮 Game Features
🧩 Relaxing Card Matching
Experience the calming joy of sorting and connecting cards. Watch as scattered pieces lock into place with a satisfying snap, revealing beautiful images one by one. The smooth swipe controls make every move feel natural and stress-free – the perfect way to unwind.
🧠 Easy to Learn, Fun to Master
Plan your moves to trigger exciting chain reactions and merge groups of cards. The game offers real strategic fun without any time pressure. Whether you have five minutes or an hour, you can play at your own pace and give your brain a gentle workout.
📸 Collectible Journey of Emotions
Completing each series of puzzles unlocks a picture filled with memories. This is your visual diary. Collect calm moments along the way. It's not just a game — it's a peaceful trip through time.
🌟 Multiple Difficulty Levels
Perfect for all players! Levels progress from easy to hard. Beginners can enjoy a relaxing sorting experience, while puzzle masters will love the challenge of complex layouts that require careful logic and thoughtful planning.
🕰️ Rich & Stunning Retro Content!
Wander through time with countryside scenes, cozy interiors, exquisite retro cars, and other nostalgic memories. Watch your puzzles come to life as they animate upon completion – taking you on a journey back in time.

🃏 How to Play
- Swipe to Move Cards – Simply drag cards anywhere on the board with your finger.
- Connect & Snap – When cards with matching patterns touch, they lock together and can be moved as a single group.

Download now and start your nostalgic card‑matching journey! Rediscover the charm of the past, one satisfying snap at a time. 🧩✨

For support or feedback, please contact us at: support@mint-games.org
Terms of Use: https://mint-games.org/terms.html
Privacy Policy: https://www.firedragongame.com/privacy.html

apps.title: Backflip Mania
apps.summary:
🤸‍♂️ Welcome to 𝗕𝗮𝗰𝗸𝗳𝗹𝗶𝗽 𝗠𝗮𝗻𝗶𝗮!
Ready to defy gravity and perform the most insane stunts ever? Welcome to 𝗕𝗮𝗰𝗸𝗳𝗹𝗶𝗽 𝗠𝗮𝗻𝗶𝗮, the ultimate destination for every parkour enthusiast looking for an extreme challenge. Put your physics skills to the test, jump off high platforms, and land the perfect flip today!

🌟 𝗛𝗶𝗴𝗵𝗹𝗶𝗴𝗵𝘁𝘀
𝗗𝗶𝘃𝗲𝗿𝘀𝗲 𝗘𝗻𝘃𝗶𝗿𝗼𝗻𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁𝘀: Flip through amazing world locations, from urban rooftops and city gym areas to tropical islands and snowy mountains.

𝗥𝗲𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗶𝗰 𝗣𝗵𝘆𝘀𝗶𝗰𝘀: Experience a true-to-life 3D physics engine where you must master the Spring tension and Rotation axis to survive. Every jump from the Trampoline bed feels uniquely satisfying.

𝗠𝗮𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗿 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗟𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗶𝗻𝗴: It’s not just about the flip—you must hit the Landing zone on your feet or use a Bail out technique to avoid a crash.

𝗖𝗵𝗮𝗿𝗮𝗰𝘁𝗲𝗿 𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗲𝘀𝘀: Unlock Airtime mastery and new action animations as you conquer harder levels. Use Progression drills to move from basic stunts to pro-level mastery.

⚡ 𝗚𝗮𝗺𝗲 𝗙𝗲𝗮𝘁𝘂𝗿𝗲𝘀
𝗘𝘅𝘁𝗿𝗲𝗺𝗲 𝗖𝗵𝗮𝗹𝗹𝗲𝗻𝗴𝗲𝘀: Face hundreds of levels where you'll need a perfect Take-off phase and Spotting technique. Execute everything from a Front tuck flip, Back tuck flip, and Side tuck flip to advanced moves like the Wall flip, Webster flip, and Gainer flip.

𝗗𝗶𝘃𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗠𝗼𝗱𝗲: Take the action to the water! Practice your Crash dive flip, Front drop flip, or Back drop flip in special pool and sea environments.

𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗨𝗹𝘁𝗶𝗺𝗮𝘁𝗲 𝗧𝗿𝗶𝗰𝗸 𝗟𝗶𝘀𝘁: Push your parkour logic to the limit with complex moves. Can you land a Barani flip, Miller flip, Half-in half-out flip, or the legendary Full-in full-out flip?

𝗖𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗲 𝗦𝘁𝘂𝗻𝘁𝘀: Experiment with technical moves like the Cody flip, Kaboom flip, Swivel hips flip, Pullover flip, or a Turntable flip. For those who love twists, try the Arabian flip, Cork flip, or a Double full twist flip.

𝗧𝗲𝗰𝗵𝗻𝗶𝗰𝗮𝗹 𝗣𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻: Find the Center point of your jump to pull off a Back pike flip, Side pike flip, or a clean Back layout flip. Whether it's a Seat drop flip, Knee drop flip, or Back handspring flip, your timing is everything.

Offline Fun: Enjoy the adrenaline of a Roundoff flip, Cradle flip, or a B-kick flip anywhere, anytime.

🏆 Do you have what it takes to be the lead?
From the safety of the Frame padding to the peak of a skyscraper, show off your Full twist flip, Standing back flip, and Aerial flip skills. Play 𝗕𝗮𝗰𝗸𝗳𝗹𝗶𝗽 𝗠𝗮𝗻𝗶𝗮 and start your extreme jump journey today!

🔎 What haunting secrets lie beneath the eternal full moon? Can the detective escape the grasp of a dream-warping cult and save the town before sleep becomes a prison? Embark on a chilling journey in Icebound Secrets 3: Endless Night, where find and seek hidden objects, ancient legends, and mythical horror collide in a city trapped in endless night. This is one of the mystery hidden object games designed to test the wit and courage of secret seekers!

🕵️ Icebound Secrets 3: Endless Night is one of the new f2p adventure games, combining immersive storytelling with the thrill of solve mystery gameplay. Dive into the cursed city of Selene Falls, a place haunted by nightmares and a forgotten cult. Uncover unsolved mysteries by collecting clues, escaping illusions, and experiencing dream-like horrors. Immerse yourself in a detective story perfect for fans of solve mystery games!

🔎 After receiving a cryptic call from Kristina, you arrive in Selene Falls to find her trapped in a phone booth, locked in an unnatural sleep. The townspeople are unconscious, and the city is cloaked in an eternal full moon. As you investigate, you uncover evidence of the Cult of Morpheus, a sect obsessed with dreams. Follow your intuition, you need solve mystery after mystery in this addictive item search game, unraveling the dark history of one of the mystery hidden object games!

- Find and seek hidden objects in eerie locations filled with secrets for free!

This isn't just one of many new f2p adventure games — it's a battle of perception and memory in which you need solve unsolved mysteries or risk being lost forever. Each location features challenging missions and hidden object gameplay that will appeal to fans of suspense and hidden mystery games!

🔎 Every level in this mystery hidden object game experience is filled with richly detailed scenes, clever riddles, and terrifying twists. Lovers of hidden mystery games and myth seekers quests will enjoy endless replay value. Whether you’re diving into unsolved mysteries, exploring cursed dreamscapes, or uncovering secrets behind the full moon, this game delivers a top-tier f2p mystery experience. apps.title: BALL x PIT
apps.summary:
BALL x PIT is a brick-breaking, ball-fusing, base-building survival roguelite. Batter hordes of enemies with ricocheting balls and gather the riches of the pit to expand your homestead, generate resources and recruit unique heroes.

BALL x PIT is a fast-paced fantasy roguelite where heroes must find the balls to plunge deeper into a seemingly bottomless pit of monsters. Develop arcane ammunition and resources in pursuit of treasure, recruiting additional heroes to aid you in your perilous quest.

Ballbylon has fallen. After a meteoric and completely unexpected event annihilated the great city, all that remains is an ominous, yawning pit. Treasure hunters from far and wide flock to the city’s tomb to seek their fortune, plumbing the depths in search of Ballbylon’s scattered riches. Few return.

The pit plays host to armies of barbaric creatures, hellbent on ending your quest before it even begins. Armed with a growing arsenal of magic-infused projectiles, batter your way through multiple levels of increasingly challenging obstacles to claim the ultimate prizes and rebuild New Ballbylon.

Fuse Your Balls
The Ball Fusion system encourages explosive experimentation with over 60 randomized balls to equip and combine during your journey. Discover overpowered combinations and unexpected synergies from hundreds of possible outcomes.

Build New Ballbylon
Expand New Ballbylon with over 70 unique buildings that provide gameplay bonuses and unlock further power-ups, new characters, and more! As your community grows, task homebound heroes with automated tasks to keep the resources coming while you dive deeper into the pit.

Discover New Realms
Face legions of diverse enemies within the pit, battling through barren deserts, frozen caverns, savage forests and more. Each region offers its own unique set of hazards on top of hordes of increasingly challenging foes and mighty, screen-filling bosses.

Recruit Fellow Hunters
As you explore the pit you’ll encounter fellow treasure hunters eager to add their skills to your expedition. Each character has unique, upgradable mechanics that totally change the way you play the game. Experimentation and adaptation are crucial to the success of New Ballbylon!

⚾PLAY WITH MLBPI SUPERSTARS. ANYTIME, ANYWHERE.
Enter the ballpark, step up to the plate, and experience the thrill of real baseball, officially licensed by MLB Players, Inc. Collect and play with today’s biggest baseball superstars in an easy-to-learn, deeply satisfying mobile baseball game built for fans.

🎮EASY TO PLAY. HARD TO PUT DOWN.
Tap to swing, time it right, and send it deep. Every pitch, hit, and home run feels authentic with lifelike motion-captured animation, realistic baseball physics, and stats based on real-life MLBPI superstars. Whether you’re chasing a clutch hit, the intensity of 9 innings, throwing strikes in Pitching Ace, or crushing moonshots in Homerun King, every swing and pitch delivers that big-league adrenaline.

Recruit and upgrade over 800 official MLBPI baseball superstars! Featuring cover athlete Cal Raleigh, the switch-hitting home run force, alongside five-tool dynamo José Ramírez, generational slugger Juan Soto, power pitcher strikeout ace Tarik Skubal, lightning-fast playmaker Corbin Carroll, and run-producing masher Vladimir Guerrero Jr.

Mix current MLBPI legends with top-ranked rising stars like Jackson Holliday, power-hitting breakout talents like Junior Caminero, and postseason breakout arms like Trey Yesavage to craft the ultimate roster. Level them up, and climb through competitive tiers to prove your lineup belongs among the elite.

⚾Hits Mode: Step into the batter's box and lead your team to victory

👑Homerun King: Pure power-hitting fun with streak bonuses
🏆Events & Tournaments: Time-limited challenges with exclusive rewards!

BEAT YOUR BASEBALL RIVALS. CLIMB THE RANKS. BUILD YOUR LEGACY.
Rise from rookie to legend as you progress through tiers, unlock powerful baseball superstars, and chase special edition stars that celebrate the best in the game. Earn reward boxes, collect currency, and keep improving season after season.

A LIVING BASEBALL WORLD WITH OFFICIAL MLBPI PLAYERS
With ongoing live events, player drops, and new content year-round, Baseball Hits 26 is more than a baseball game; it’s your home for authentic baseball action on mobile. Every update brings new challenges, new baseball stars, and new reasons to play.

apps.title: DRAGON QUEST Smash/Grow
apps.summary:
Experience fast-paced action in this new roguelite DRAGON QUEST RPG!

DRAGON QUEST with fast, intuitive combat!
Embark on a new roguelite RPG adventure!

Smash your way through hordes of monsters, then blow them away with Dragon Quest’s signature Coup de Grâce attacks! Grow your character with random Blessings and adapt your battle strategy to match an ever-changing tactical situation. No quest is ever the same in this unique Dragon Quest experience!

Game Features
- BLESSINGS
Mix and match Blessings for a unique experience every run! Blessings reshuffle every stage. Race through rifts with luck and strategy!

- VOCATIONS
Forge your party from a variety of classic vocations! Beyond levelling up, unlock vocation tree nodes to enhance each vocation’s abilities!

- MAIN STORY
Embark on a grand adventure to restore order to the world! Navigate dungeons known as rifts that have appeared all over the land with your trusty mechanical ally Roly in tow!

- CO-OP QUESTS
Join forces with up to 3 other players for exciting co-op quests! Bring your characters together and crush hordes of monsters!

- PACKED WITH CONTENT
Bring your best party to bear in even greater challenges! Smash through swarms of monsters in the Gauntlette, take on formidable bosses in Shrines, and dive into a wealth of content waiting to be explored!

Compatibility
Android: Requires Android 9.0 or later, a 64-bit device with a Snapdragon 855 or better, and at least 6GB of RAM.

apps.title: Wordington Solitaire
apps.summary:
Solitaire Associations with a Story

Join Emma on her emotional and unforgettable journey in Wordington Solitaire! Help her renovate her grandfather's beautiful old house and restore it to its former glory—while experiencing a story filled with secrets, friendship, and romance.
The old house and garden are in desperate need of a complete renovation, and Emma can't do it alone. To progress through the story, you'll play engaging levels of Solitaire Associations. By connecting cards and completing levels, you earn stars that unlock new chapters of the story, new rooms to renovate, and hidden mysteries from Emma's past.
Behind every door, new surprises await.

Wordington Solitaire includes:
- Unique Solitaire Associations gameplay: Connect cards in clever ways and complete levels to move forward in the story.
- Renovation & interior design: Create your dream home by choosing from a variety of design options for every room.
- A captivating story: Follow Emma's journey as she uncovers secrets her grandfather left behind.
- Colorful characters: Meet Pizza David, Handy Bob, and many more. Could there be a little romance blossoming between Emma and David...?
- An adorable pet: Meet the sweet dog Max and discover the adventures he brings along.

Explore bedrooms, living rooms, kitchens, the garden, and much more. You're in full control of how the house will look—every choice you make shapes the final result. Choose from a wide selection of furniture, decorations, and styles to create a home that truly feels personal.
No stress—just engaging solitaire levels, creative design, and a story that unfolds with every step you take.
As soon as you complete your first level in Wordington Solitaire, Emma's journey to transform the old house into a true dream home begins.
Connect the cards. Unlock the story. Transform the house.

The adventure starts now.

apps.title: Last Furry: Survival
apps.summary:
A cataclysmic conspiracy has released toxic fog over the once-vibrant planet Furry, plunging it into apocalyptic chaos. Many have perished, while others mutated into savage monsters. The remaining survivors now fight for their lives in this toxic wasteland — with scarce resources, suffocating air, and relentless beast attacks.

As Commander, YOU are destined to lead these survivors. Your strategic prowess and unyielding courage will be crucial in establishing a shelter, purifying the land, and combating the spreading toxic fog. Rally your people to rebuild civilization from the ashes and conquer the ultimate survival challenge!

[Game Features]

BUILD & MANAGE YOUR SHELTER
Transform ruins into a thriving refuge! Every decision counts—manage food supplies, purify toxic air, provide medical care, and fortify against threats. Your strategic planning and resource management will decide if your shelter flourishes or falls under the toxic fog.

LIVING, BREATHING SURVIVORS
Each survivor brings unique emotions, backstories, and personalities to your shelter. They'll show joy when comfortable, despair when hungry, and gratitude when protected. Through personal letters and dynamic interactions, you'll resolve conflicts, earn loyalty, and create unbreakable bonds with those you protect.

HIGH-STAKES EXPLORATION
Venture beyond safety into the toxic unknown! Lead squads to gather vital resources and salvage forgotten technologies. But beware—mutated beasts and hostile factions lurk in the toxic fog, making every exploration a high-risk, high-reward venture.

RECRUIT TALENTED HEROES
Find and recruit remarkable heroes with unique abilities! Build an elite team of specialists—fearsome warriors who excel in combat, brilliant engineers who boost development, and mysterious figures with powers that can change fate itself. Upgrade their gear, enhance their skills, and unleash their full potential!

FORM POWERFUL ALLIANCE
Survival requires unity! Create alliances to trade essential resources, share critical intelligence, and stand together against formidable threats. Join forces with other Commanders to push back the toxic fog and reclaim your broken world.

ENDLESS CHALLENGES
Encounter constantly evolving threats that demand your leadership! Plan explorations, develop purification strategies, issue impactful decrees, and tackle unexpected crises. Every decision shapes not just survival, but the future of civilization itself.

The toxic fog still chokes the land, but hope refuses to die.

Commander, will you lead humanity into a new dawn?

Download now and fight for the future!

Welcome to the official social media page of Last Furry to discover more exciting content:
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/lastfurrysurvival
Discord: https://discord.gg/EQb6jk7HNX
Email: lastfurry@staruniongame.com
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/lastfurrysurvival/

apps.title: The Urban Rewind
apps.summary:
The Urban Rewind is a timed, multiple-choice trivia game centered on music and pop culture. Players test their knowledge across entertainment categories while managing a virtual currency system (“Mics”), unlocking achievements, and progressing through tiered levels.

Categories & Access

At launch, players have access to:
* Hip-Hop
* R&B

The TV and Movies categories are visible but locked, indicated with a lock icon.

Players begin with 3 Mics. Locked categories and additional Mics can be purchased via in-app purchases. Tapping a locked category or “Buy Mics” opens the checkout interface with the correct product and pricing.

On successful purchase:
* Mic balances or category access update immediately.
* If a category is unlocked, the user is automatically taken to that category’s “Good Luck” screen.
On failed or canceled transactions:
* The user returns to the previous screen.
* No changes are made to access or Mic balance.

Players can assign purchased Mics to specific categories from the Play screen. During active gameplay, Mics default to the current category but may be adjusted.

Gameplay & Mic Rules

Each session presents one question at a time with four answer choices (A/B/C/D). After selecting an answer, players receive immediate feedback (“Correct” or “Incorrect”) along with explanatory text.

Mics function as the attempt system:
* A player is not considered to have lost while 1 Mic remains.
* If prompted to purchase Mics at this stage, the gameplay timer resets to 10 seconds once the prompt is accepted or dismissed.
A loss occurs only when the Mic count reaches 0.
* When this happens, the session ends and a Results screen is displayed.
* If a user purchases Mics after reaching 0, they cannot resume the ended session. They must restart the category from 0 correct answers (clean restart), though they may restart within their highest unlocked level band.
* After purchasing Mics following a loss, users are redirected to the Home screen.

Leveling & Progression
Each category features a cumulative badge system. All badges are grayed out at the start.

Level thresholds:
* Gold: 15 correct answers
* Platinum: 20 additional correct answers
* Multi-Platinum: 25 additional correct answers
* Diamond: 30 additional correct answers

Levels must be completed sequentially.

Once Diamond is achieved:
* The category is considered complete.
* The user is routed back to the beginning to replay the category.
* The Diamond badge remains visible until Gold is reached again during replay.

The highest level achieved in each category is permanently recorded. If a user exits or loses, they resume from the difficulty band of their highest unlocked level rather than starting from the beginning.

Audio & Sponsor Integration

Sponsor-provided background music (Artist + Title) plays on:
* Splash screen
* Login screen
* Rules screen
* Category selection screen

Music is ON by default when the app launches or when returning to the main screen. Users may tap a track to open an external link (e.g., Spotify or social media) in their browser.

During gameplay:
* Correct and Incorrect sound effects play for every question.
* On level-up, a dedicated Level-Up sound plays, and background music is temporarily paused.

UI & Session Management
Before starting any category, users see a “Good Luck” screen displaying their current level.

If a user leaves mid-session, the app saves:
* Question index
* Mic count
* Progress

Upon returning, users are prompted to Continue or Start Over.

A Results screen appears when:
* The user exits,
* A level threshold is reached, or
* Mics reach 0.

The Results screen displays total correct and incorrect answers, Mic changes, and the next milestone required for level advancement.

* Multi-Platinum: 25 additional correct answers
* Diamond: 30 additional correct answers

Levels must be completed sequentially.

Once Diamond is achieved:
* The category is considered complete.
* The user is routed back to the beginning to replay the category.
* The Diamond badge remains visible until Gold is reached again during replay.

The highest level achieved in each category is permanently recorded. If a user exits or loses, they resume from the difficulty band of their highest unlocked level rather than starting from the beginning.

Audio & Sponsor Integration

Sponsor-provided background music (Artist + Title) plays on:
* Splash screen
* Login screen
* Rules screen
* Category selection screen

Music is ON by default when the app launches or when returning to the main screen. Users may tap a track to open an external link (e.g., Spotify or social media) in their browser.

During gameplay:
* Correct and Incorrect sound effects play for every question.
* On level-up, a dedicated Level-Up sound plays, and background music is temporarily paused.

UI & Session Management
Before starting any category, users see a “Good Luck” screen displaying their current level.

If a user leaves mid-session, the app saves:
* Question index
* Mic count
* Progress

Upon returning, users are prompted to Continue or Start Over.

A Results screen appears when:
* The user exits,
* A level threshold is reached, or
* Mics reach 0.

The Results screen displays total correct and incorrect answers, Mic changes, and the next milestone required for level advancement.

apps.title: Immortal Celestial Fate
apps.summary:
From the moment your spirit roots awaken to the perfection of the Nascent Soul, every moment of idle cultivation is a gentle echo of the Dao, responding to unwavering determination.

A group of 21st-century Earth travelers, on a graduation trip, accidentally venture deep into the world’s highest mountain range. There, they discover a hidden Immortal Realm—and are unexpectedly drawn into this higher plane of existence.

After a brief loss of consciousness, you slowly awaken to find yourself in an unfamiliar world. Your companions have vanished without a trace, leaving behind a quiet sense of loss.
As the group’s leader, you make a choice—to embark on a journey across the Immortal Realm in search of your missing allies.

As you familiarize yourself with your surroundings and calm your mind to sense the changes within your body, excitement begins to surge.
Your body overflows with power, as if it holds endless strength. A light jump sends you three meters into the air and five meters forward.
If this were Earth, wouldn’t every track-and-field world record be yours?

Regaining your composure, you press onward—only to stumble into a hidden valley barrier, where you uncover a mysterious and profound arcane scripture…

Chaos looms over the Immortal Realm.
You step onto the path of destiny.
Countless Daos collide—who will rise above all?

And so, the story begins.

In this vast cultivation world, you can refine pills, forge equipment, cultivate in seclusion, temper meridians, master cultivation techniques and formations, and collect and nurture Artifacts, Dharma Bodies, Divine Beasts, Spirit Companions, Ancestral Sigils, and Exotic Flames.
You may also recruit companions or Dao partners, venture through the Immortal Realm, and forge an age of prosperity.

apps.title: Arrow Cube Escape
apps.summary:
Welcome to *Arrow Cube Escape*.
Featuring a simple yet beautiful design, this logic puzzle game will test your thinking skills, concentration, and creativity.
Carefully navigate the intricately intertwined maze of arrows and remove them all without making a single mistake.
Each stage presents a unique challenge that combines logical thinking, timing, and spatial awareness.

Enjoy a rewarding puzzle experience that requires both intuition and strategic thinking.

The goal is simple, but you must never let your guard down.
Remove the arrows in the correct order to clear them all from the cube.
Anticipate your next move, visualize chain reactions, and discover the optimal sequence.

Whether you’re a puzzle veteran or a beginner,
“Arrow Cube Escape” delivers two distinct pleasures: the joy of thinking and a sense of calm tranquility.

Each puzzle is a story that demands logic, patience, and precision.
Can you remove all the arrows placed on the six sides?

Test your mental agility in a quiet, beautiful world.
“Arrow Cube Escape” will become your new “healing time for the mind.”
